Package it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient

Class HandCardsMessage

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.Message
it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClientMessage
it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient.HandCardsMessage
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class HandCardsMessage extends ServerToClientMessage implements Serializable
Message sent from server to client to update the hand cards of a player.

  • Constructor Details

    • HandCardsMessage

      public HandCardsMessage(int clientID, ArrayList<PlayableCard> handCards)
      Constructs a HandCardsMessage with the specified client ID and hand cards.
      Parameters:
      clientID - the ID of the client receiving the message
      handCards - the updated hand cards of the player

  • Method Details

    • execute

      public void execute(Client client)
      Sets the hand cards for the client's virtual view.
      Specified by:
      execute in class ServerToClientMessage
      Parameters:
      client - the client on which to execute the message
